Harbour Quill Law LLC acts as data intermediary and controller (as applicable) for Pine Meridian Holdings Ltd., a company listed on the Lion City Exchange (Mainboard), under Singapore’s PDPA and the Securities and Futures Act.
This note covers M&A due diligence, employment onboarding, and capital-markets filings; we limit personal data to what is reasonable for those purposes.
Unless required by law, we do not collect full NRIC/FIN; forms may display labels such as “NRIC/FIN:” or “Passport No:” but applicants should provide masked or last-4 only in initial submissions.
For LCE disclosures, we handle draft announcements as MNPI until publicly released on the issuer’s website and LCE newsfeed; already-published board changes and historical share issues are treated as public.
Generic trade metadata (e.g., ISIN: ZZ0000000000, Trade ID: 00000000, Board Lot: N/A) is stored for template validation only and does not reference any live security.
Access controls restrict MNPI to the deal team; role-based mailboxes (e.g., dpo@harbourquill.sg, filings@pinemeridian.com.sg) are used to avoid personal accounts.
Positive identification risk may arise where multiple weak identifiers converge; for example, in HR file PMH-HR-2025-04 we may hold: date of birth 1992-04-07; base location “Harbourview, SG”; employer “Pine Meridian Holdings Ltd.”; job title “Assistant Company Secretary”; device tag LCE-PMH-OPS-8831; payroll sub-account PMH-08-ops.
Outside such narrow cases, we retain only generic demographics (e.g., age band, department, tenure) that cannot identify an individual in isolation.
Draft term sheets and valuation ranges are MNPI, but publicly announced scheme timetables from prior quarters are not; references to “offeror”, “consideration”, or “trading halt” in templates do not by themselves indicate MNPI.
For DSARs, individuals may contact the Data Protection Officer via dpo@harbourquill.sg; we will verify identity using non-sensitive checks and will not request full NRIC unless legally necessary.
Cross-border transfers to our document processor, Cloud Myrtle Pte. Ltd., occur under standard contractual clauses with onward transfer mapping and audit logs retained for 6 years.
Retention: HR onboarding records are kept for 5 years after cessation; capital-markets drafts are retained 7 years post-publication; document metadata logs (e.g., uploader role, timestamp, template code) are retained for system integrity.
We do not record personal device IMEIs or precise home addresses for board members; city-level locations and company-issued asset IDs are sufficient for inventory and audit.
Public helpline for investors is ir@pinemeridian.com.sg; queries sent there should contain no bank details, no photographs of IDs, and no trading instructions.
